source.book_title: DBT Skills Training Handouts and Worksheets, Second Edition
source.author: Marsha M. Linehan
source.extraction_method: PDF outline/table-of-contents assisted parsing with paraphrased summaries and app schemas
source.copyright_note: This JSON is an original structured index and paraphrased schema. It intentionally does not reproduce full handout or worksheet text from the book.

copyright_note: Worksheet entries are paraphrased templates for app data capture; they do not include original worksheet text.

privacy_and_safety.sensitive_data: Worksheet responses can include mental-health, relationship, trauma, addiction, and crisis information.
privacy_and_safety.storage: Prefer local-first storage, encryption, export/delete controls, and minimal data retention.
privacy_and_safety.crisis_use: Distress tolerance worksheets can help during urges, but apps should still show emergency resources when safety risk is high.
